---
title: "sim_study1"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
norm_data <- function(mu, sigma, n) {
  x <- rnorm(n,mu,sigma)
  
  x_bar <- mean(x)
  s <- sd(x)
  error <- qt(0.975, df = n-1) * s / sqrt(n)
  
  lower <- x_bar - error
  upper <- x_bar + error

  return ((lower <= mu) & (mu <= upper))
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(47)
ci_map <- map_lgl(1:1000, ~ norm_data(5,2,50)) |>
  mean() |>
  print()
```
